parameters.query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT jsonb_build_object('title', title, 'agency', agency, 'naics', naics, 'value', estimated_value, 'stage', stage, 'pwin', pwin)
     FROM gda_opportunities WHERE id = {{ ($input.first().json.body.opp_id || '0') }}::int),
    '{}'::jsonb
  ) as opp_context,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('name', name, 'threat_level', threat_level, 'capabilities', capabilities))
     FROM gda_competitor_watchlist WHERE name ILIKE '%{{ ($input.first().json.body.target || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}%' LIMIT 5),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) as comp_context

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_deep_research (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  target TEXT NOT NULL,
  research_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  opp_id INT,
  report JSONB NOT NULL,
  executive_summary TEXT,
  confidence TEXT DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
  sources_used INT DEFAULT 0,
  follow_up_queries JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
INSERT INTO gda_deep_research (target, research_type, opp_id, report, executive_summary, confidence, sources_used, follow_up_queries)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.target.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.type.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.opp_id ? $json.opp_id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.report).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ ($json.report.executive_summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 2000) }}',
  '{{ $json.report.confidence_rating || 'MEDIUM' }}',
  {{ $json.report.sources_used || 0 }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.report.follow_up_research || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
RETURNING id, target, research_type

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  status: 'complete',
  research_id: $('Build Embed Payload').first().json.research_id,
  target: $('Build Embed Payload').first().json.target,
  type: $('Build Embed Payload').first().json.type,
  confidence: ($('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report.confidence_rating || 'N/A'),
  executive_summary: (($('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report.executive_summary || '').substring(0, 500)),
  key_findings_count: (($('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report.key_findings || []).length),
  recommended_actions: ((($('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report.capture_implications || {}).recommended_actions || []).slice(0, 5)),
  sources_used: ($('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report.sources_used || 0),
  follow_up_queries: ($('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report.follow_up_research || []),
  report: $('Build Embed Payload').first().json.report
}) }}
